ogTitle: Jil Jil vs Jindivick: Climate Safety

heading: Jil Jil vs Jindivick — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jil Jil, Victoria and Jindivick, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jil Jil has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jindivick (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jil Jil or Jindivick safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jil Jil has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Jindivick scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jil Jil scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Jindivick scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jil Jil or Jindivick?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jil Jil has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
